criteria.description: --search is case-insensitive by default; --case-sensitive makes it exact
--regex <pattern> filters entries matching a regex across string fields
--invert shows entries that do NOT match the other filters

verification.notes: All 12 SF_6/SF_7/SF_8 tests pass. CLI flags --case-sensitive, --regex, --invert are wired in search.go. InvertFilter uses compositeFilter for correct AND-then-negate semantics. No hidden debt.
